dct_title_s: Americae : De Consilio inito Insulam S. Vincentii petendi, quam Lusitani possident
dct_description_sm: Shows fortified settlements on the islands of St. Vincent and Maro, and the surrounding mainland; figures, vegetation, fish, shipwreck.
From de Bry's Grand voyages Americae, 1593.
dct_rights_sm: Images from the The Renaissance Exploration Collection courtesy Stanford University Libraries. This item is in the public domain. There are no restrictions on use. If you have questions, please contact the David Rumsey Map Center at rumseymapcenter@stanford.edu.
